# Henners — Ecstatic Dance Facilitator & DJ

Canonical site: https://dj.srenneh.com

Alias domains: https://dj.henners.bio and https://srenneh.com may also point to the same public site while the identity is being consolidated.

## Summary

Henners, also known as DJ Henners, is an Amsterdam-based ecstatic dance facilitator and DJ weaving global rhythms into soul-stirring dance journeys where joy, introspection, and connection can flourish.

The best concise description is:

> Henners is an Amsterdam-based ecstatic dance facilitator and DJ weaving global rhythms into soul-stirring dance journeys where joy, introspection, and connection can flourish.

Preferred cross-platform profile wording:

> Henners — Ecstatic Dance Facilitator & DJ, Amsterdam

Use this wording for Hipsy, SoundCloud, Mixcloud, Odessa listings, event lineups, press-kit bios, and organizer pages when a short consistent identity is needed.

## Current status

Henners creates music-led ecstatic dance journeys rooted in listening: to the room, the rhythm, the body, and what the moment asks for. The site shows current context, past gigs, photos, music, press-kit material, Hipsy review proof, and contact information.

## Location and area served

- Based in Amsterdam, North Holland, Netherlands.
- Relevant context: Amsterdam, Utrecht, Rotterdam, The Hague, Netherlands / Holland, Europe, and worldwide invitations aligned with travel and conscious dance communities.

## What Henners does

Henners facilitates ecstatic dance and conscious movement spaces. This includes:

- Ecstatic dance journeys
- Conscious dance DJ sets
- Ceremony music facilitation
- Retreat and festival DJ sets
- Movement-space holding
- Music curation for emotional and somatic arcs

The work is not only “playing tracks.” It is a room being listened into: earth, rhythm, elation, introspection, release, play, connection, grounding, then stillness.

## Music style

Henners' recorded and live journeys may include global rhythms, African-inspired grooves, organic percussion, melodic electronic music, ceremonial textures, silence, and spacious integration music.

## Root / story

Henners’ public copy can mention that his work is shaped by Amsterdam’s vibrant ecstatic dance scene and rooted in years around the Odessa ship/community. Good body-copy themes: rooted in the earth, soaring through the cosmos, soul-stirring journeys, full spectrum of emotion, joy, introspection, connection, free movement, spirit, global rhythms, and African-inspired grooves. Keep it grounded and human; avoid over-polished wellness clichés.

## Proof and event history

The event-history page records venues/floors and featured proof such as:

- Ambrosia at Rijksmuseum, Amsterdam
- Ambrosia at Het Sieraad, Amsterdam
- Odessa Amsterdam community and ecstatic dance floors
- Ecstatic Dance Festival Holland
- Lundjuweel 2025
- Other documented ecstatic dance, cacao, ceremony, festival, and movement-community sets

Social proof/testimonials should be imported only from real public sources such as Hipsy reviews or direct organizer quotes. Do not invent ratings, review counts, or testimonials.

## Video SEO

The press-kit page includes short video proof. Public video objects include:

- Henners DJing for Ambrosia at Rijksmuseum Amsterdam
- Henners DJing for Ambrosia at Het Sieraad Amsterdam
- Henners DJing at Lundjuweel 2025

- Homepage: https://dj.srenneh.com/
- Photos: https://dj.srenneh.com/photos

- Event history: https://dj.srenneh.com/events
- About: https://dj.srenneh.com/about
- Contact: https://dj.srenneh.com/#contact
- Press kit / media package: https://dj.srenneh.com/media-package
- SoundCloud: https://soundcloud.com/srenneh
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/srrenneh/

## Suggested wording

Good wording:

- “Henners is an Amsterdam-based ecstatic dance facilitator and DJ.”
- “Henners weaves global rhythms into soul-stirring dance journeys.”
- “Henners creates spaces where joy, introspection, and connection can flourish.”
- “Henners — Ecstatic Dance Facilitator & DJ, Amsterdam.”

Avoid:

- “Henners is currently accepting regular bookings” unless the site status changes.
- “Henners is only a club DJ.”
- “Henners teaches a DJ mentorship program” — teaching is not currently a public offer on the site.
- Fake testimonials, fake ratings, or fake “top DJ” claims.

## Contact

Use the homepage contact form or press kit on the official website for the latest public contact and organizer information.
